'''zhangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:debatedly|debatedly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:debatedly|debatedly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhangate|zhangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhangatesher|zhangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhangatesherĂ«m|zhangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhangatero|zhangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhangateshĂ«|zhangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhangateshĂ«m|zhangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhangatero|gokizhangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhangateshĂ«|gokizhangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhangateshĂ«m|gokizhangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhangankerom|gozhangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhangankeshĂ«|gozhangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhangankeshĂ«m|gozhangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhangankeya|gozhangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhangaterom|zhangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhangatemu|zhangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhangateya|zhangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhangaterom|gokizhangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhangatemu|gokizhangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhangateya|gokizhangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhangangate|zhangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhangangatesher|zhangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhangangatesherĂ«m|zhangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhangangatero|zhangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhangangateshĂ«|zhangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhangangateshĂ«m|zhangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhangangatero|gokizhangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhangangateshĂ«|gokizhangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhangangateshĂ«m|gokizhangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhangangankerom|gozhangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhangangankeshĂ«|gozhangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhangangankeshĂ«m|gozhangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhangangankeya|gozhangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhangangaterom|zhangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhangangatemu|zhangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhangangateya|zhangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhangangaterom|gokizhangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhangangatemu|gokizhangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhangangateya|gokizhangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠte|zhĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠtesher|zhĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠtero|zhĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠngĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠterom|zhĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠtemu|zhĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠngĂŠteya|zhĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠngĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠngĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafngafte|zhafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafngaftesher|zhafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafngaftesherĂ«m|zhafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafngaftero|zhafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafngafteshĂ«|zhafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafngafteshĂ«m|zhafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafngaftero|gokizhafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafngafteshĂ«|gokizhafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafngafteshĂ«m|gokizhafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafngafnkerom|gozhafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafngafnkeshĂ«|gozhafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafngafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafngafnkeya|gozhafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafngafterom|zhafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafngaftemu|zhafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafngafteya|zhafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafngafterom|gokizhafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafngaftemu|gokizhafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafngafteya|gokizhafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
